blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "The service was genuinely warm and attentive from start to finish — you feel welcomed the moment you walk in.

The champagne selection is outstanding. Whether you’re celebrating or just treating yourself, there’s an impressive range to choose from, and the staff are happy to guide you to the perfect bottle.

And the oysters? Absolutely fantastic — fresh, beautifully presented, and full of flavour. Pairing them with a great glass of champagne makes for the perfect experience."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Really cool concept, the woman that led us into the bar was very expressive in her story telling. Once we were inside, there was a magician going around to different tables which was a unique experience. Great layout to the bar, and was perfect for our larger group as they had different sections depending on group size. Cocktails and food were good. Definitely recommend."

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Great set up for a speakeasy, and the decor was top-notch. Staff were friendly and knowledgeable. Higher priced cocktails, but it seems to be expected based on the venue. Cocktail execution is 3 out of 5
It's a lot of shaking for show, but still a good bar solid cocktails. This place with a few tweaks can be awesome."
